purpose: Main application class for SpaceFX, a JavaFX-based space shooter game. It initializes the game state, handles user input for gameplay controls, and manages the lifecycle of the application.

return_value.description: No return value. Initializes the game state variables and creates a new instance of SpaceFXView.

parameters.name: stage
parameters.description: The primary stage for this application, onto which the scene is set.

return_value.description: No return value. Sets up the game scene, handles key events for gameplay controls, and displays the stage.
No return value. Exits the application if it is not running in a browser.

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Command line arguments passed to the application.

return_value.description: No return value. Launches the JavaFX application.
